title: AF2R
description: A Legacy Fabric mod makes 15w14a able to join 1.8.X servers.
body:
# April Fools 2 Release

## About

A Legacy Fabric mod makes 15w14a able to join 1.8.X servers.

Uses Mixins to change protocol and re-added carrot on a stick dummy item to prevent crash.

![image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Gjbful7H/images/6ce43bc0feba82c656d41c17f6f9d2d400b6f524.png)

Enjoy old pvp with loves-and-hugs textures!
